<user_query>
After latest edits, check for remaining HIGH parity issues in these files: frontend/src/lib/tierResolver.js, frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.js, frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.js, frontend/src/config/routeAccessConfig.js, backend/tier_resolver.py, backend/routes/deps.py, frontend/src/config/pricingTiers.js, frontend/src/config/tiers.js. Return only HIGH findings if any.
</user_query>
Reading the listed files to compare frontend and backend tier/route logic for HIGH-severity parity gaps.
Checking for `/prompt-lab` routing and verifying `superadmin` handling in `resolve_tier`.
Checking how `LaunchRoute` applies waitlist logic and whether it matches the backend.
